task_objective: Enlarge the 'X' in the cloud-with-X status icon for Syncthing warnings (cloud-x-icon-size).
tests_added: Updated existing test 'uses the amber warning style and cloud-with-X icon treatment' to assert the new larger X path.
design_decisions: Replaced the smaller 84x84 X path (stroke-width 34) with a larger 120x120 X path (stroke-width 40) centered at the same coordinates within the amber cloud SVG, keeping the cloud body unchanged.
results: Test assertion updated and passed. HTML visual reference updated. All quality gates passed successfully.
